description_long: This object is a futuristic, military-style airplane with a distinctive forward-swept wing configuration and a long, narrow fuselage. The wings are mounted mid-fuselage and angle sharply forward, ending in downward-angled tips. The main body is predominantly olive green with subtle panel lines and red-orange highlights, suggesting armored plating and advanced technology. The rear section features a prominent engine housing and a unique tail structure with horizontal stabilizers extending outward. The cockpit is centrally located and appears to be heavily armored, with a canopy integrated into the fuselage. The overall design is sleek and aggressive, resembling a science fiction or alien attack craft.
description: A futuristic, olive green airplane with forward-swept wings, a long fuselage, and a central armored cockpit. The design is sleek, angular, and military-inspired.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, forward-swept wings and the central cockpit canopy.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, engine housing, and the angular tail structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin horizontal stabilizers and the detailed engine section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the wing and tail configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, forward-swept wings with pronounced anhedral angle and downward-angled wingtips; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet engine integrated into the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin horizontal stabilizers and a single central vertical stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Not visibly extended; likely retractable landing gear based on design, but not apparent in images.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Mid-fuselage, enclosed cockpit with armored canopy, likely single-seat.
